title: Krieg Tightens His Grip on the Baratie
description: On pages 13–16, Krieg’s forces push harder against the Baratie, using numbers, weapons, and intimidation while Sanji and the cooks struggle to hold the line.
scene: The restaurant becomes a battlefield where Krieg’s idea of strength clashes with the Baratie’s pride and the Straw Hats’ refusal to yield.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Haha! Nice one, patty! Carne! Go get'em!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Opening the "Fins"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Hm? What is it this time...?

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Ack! I'm sinking!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: If you pirates want a fight, then bring it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aghhhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's that!?

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: A platform appeared,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: From below the sea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Cool!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: I see... they don't want us fighting inside and destroying the restaurant.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: All the better for us when we take that ship.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Now I want that ship even more!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Just what the hell can a couple of meals cooks do,

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: against US Pirates!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't you dare look down,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: On us cooks of the sea!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: gyahahaha! C'mon! Show'em the power of fights' cooks!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: pathy! Now's not the time to be distracted! We've gotta aim for him!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Prepare yourself, Krieg!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Allow us to demon- strate the power of baratie's pride!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Become soup for the fishies!

summary: This part keeps increasing the pressure on the Baratie and exposes the brutality of Krieg’s command structure.
